hero.headline: Building clear, practical
hero.description: Focused on well-structured websites and web applications designed with simplicity, performance, and usability in mind.

about.story1: My journey hasn't followed a straight path. Starting over in a new place taught me patience, adaptability, and the value of steady effort, even when progress takes time.
about.story2: I live in Trier, Germany, and work full-time as a postman at DHL Deutsche Post, where reliability, structure, and responsibility are essential every day.
about.story3: Outside working hours, coding is my focused personal pursuit. In my free time, I build and refine personal web projects, explore new technologies, and continue learning step by step.
about.story4: This portfolio reflects that mindset: consistency, care, and long-term growth.
about.fullTimeJobDescription: I work in mail and parcel delivery, where precision, reliability, and structure are part of everyday life. This role has strengthened my organizational skills, time management, and attention to detail. Outside working hours, I apply the same disciplined approach to personal web projects building simple, well-structured applications and continuously learning new technologies.
about.codingDescription1: Outside working hours, I focus on coding as a personal craft. It's where I learn, experiment, and gradually build practical web projects from clean, straightforward websites to small, well-structured applications.
about.codingDescription2: Each project helps me deepen my understanding of modern technologies while reinforcing a careful, thoughtful approach to building clear and reliable solutions.

projects.title: Featured
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that showcase my skills and expertise

digitalMenu.title: Digital Menu
digitalMenu.description: A modern digital menu website providing an interactive dining experience with easy navigation and beautiful presentation.

adria.title: Adria - Ristorante and Pizza
adria.description: A restaurant website showcasing authentic Italian cuisine, menu, and dining experience.

cleanGenerale.title: Clean Generale
cleanGenerale.description: A professional cleaning service website showcasing services and expertise.

ivofresh.title: IvoFresh
ivofresh.description: Fresh juices, smoothies and a healthy lifestyle, region-based seasonal produce and natural ingredients.

euromiti.title: Euromiti - Petrol, Restaurant & Service
euromiti.description: A Kosovo-based petrol, restaurant and service company offering fuel, carwash, mini market and a comfortable stop for travelers.

royalCeramics.title: Royal Ceramics - Premium Showroom Website
royalCeramics.description: A modern one-page showroom website presenting ceramic tiles, sanitaryware, bathroom accessories, and interior finishing products in a clean, premium way.

yummyPita.title: Yummy Pita - Shija e Vërtetë | Ferizaj
yummyPita.description: A modern promotional one-page website for a fast-food business offering pite, burgers, sandwiches, drinks, and quick meals with bold visuals and a fresh, professional brand presence.

contact.description1: I take on a limited number of web projects independently and outside working hours. I'm always open to thoughtful conversations around ideas, personal projects, or simple web solutions that benefit from a clear and practical approach.
contact.description2: If you need a simple, well-built website for your business or have a small web project in mind, I'm happy to explore whether working together makes sense.
contact.description3: Based in Trier, Germany, I collaborate remotely when time allows. Feel free to reach out via email or connect with me on social media.
contact.clientFormTitle: Website project? You may need to fill out a form
contact.clientFormNote: When you contact me about a website, I may send you a short project request form to fill out first. It helps me understand your goals, timeline, and requirements before we discuss the details.

footer.description: Web developer building modern, practical solutions. Available for remote projects outside working hours.

webform.title: Website Request
webform.subtitle: Fill in the details below and I'll get back to you with a thoughtful response — usually within 1–2 days.
webform.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
webform.agreeLabel: I confirm that the information provided is accurate and I consent to it being sent directly to Denis Januzi's email solely to review and respond to my website request. Your details are not stored in any database.
webform.agreeNotice: Please allow 1–2 days for your request to be reviewed. If approved, you will be notified and contacted to discuss the project further.
webform.agreeRequired: Please confirm your consent before submitting the form.
webform.websiteReferencesRequired: Please add at least one website reference.

sectionHints.contact: Who you are and how I can reach you.
sectionHints.brand: Style inspiration, colors, and materials you can provide.
sectionHints.hosting: What you already have for going live online.
sectionHints.details: Rough budget and timing — optional but helpful.

webform.hostingNotice: Domain and hosting must be registered in your name and paid for directly by you. They are required only to publish your website online. You are responsible for keeping both services active and covering all renewal fees.

namecheapProvider.title: Purchase at Namecheap
namecheapProvider.hint: You can register your domain and hosting in your name at Namecheap.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: What is your business about? What should the website achieve?
fields.featuresPlaceholder: e.g. Home, About, Menu, Contact form, Gallery, Blog...
fields.languagesHint: Add the languages the website should be available in.
fields.websiteReferencesHint: Add at least one website you like — for inspiration or as a style example (up to 3).
fields.colorsHint: Which colors would you like to dominate the design?
fields.colorsPlaceholder: e.g. dark blue and white, gold accents, green and black...
fields.assetsHint: Can you provide materials to use on the site — logo, photos, videos, and text?
fields.notesPlaceholder: Anything else I should know about your project...

success.title: Request Sent!
success.message: Thank you for reaching out. I've received your website request and will get back to you as soon as possible — usually within 1–2 days.
